THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOUGH, T. ALEX LOUGH, ANNETTE BESSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 546-27TH AVENUE, #1, SAN FRANCISCO $2,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFENDANTS, T. ALEX LOUGH AND ANNETTE BESSE LOUGH WILL PAY THE SUM OF $2500 IN INSTALLMENTS OF $100 PER MONTH BEGINNING 4-29-95 AND ON THE FIRST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL THE ENTIRE SUM IS PAID.
